prompts: Look at your trash can. Draw the topmost item visible right now.
Draw the condensation drops on the outside of your current glass.
If your patience was a rubber band, draw how stretched it is right now.
Look at the nearest window. Draw the most prominent smudge or raindrop on it.
Draw your current mood as a simple weather icon on a sticky note.
Draw the shape of the nearest plant leaf, including any brown spots or tears.
If your motivation was a campfire, draw how big the flames are right now.
Look at your watch or clock. Draw the exact angle of the hands.
Draw the shape of the nearest stain or mark on your desk.
If your to-do list was a stack of pancakes, draw how tall it is.
Draw the exact way your shoelaces are tied or untied now.
Look at the nearest book. Draw the angle it is resting at.
Look at the nearest cable or cord. Draw the way it curls or tangles right now.
Draw the exact pattern of crumbs or dust on your keyboard.
If your hunger was a balloon, draw how inflated it is right now.
Look at your hand. Draw the most prominent line or wrinkle on your palm.
Draw the shape of the shadow cast by the nearest object on your desk.
Look at the nearest cup or mug. Draw the ring or stain it left behind.
If your energy was a phone battery, draw the icon at its current level.
Draw the exact fold or crease in the nearest piece of paper.
Look up at the ceiling. Draw the nearest crack, mark, or light fixture.
Draw the way your pen or pencil is resting right now.
If your stress was a knotted string, draw how tangled it is.
Look at the nearest wall socket. Draw what is plugged into it.
Draw the steam rising from your drink, or the still air above it.
Look at your sleeve or cuff. Draw the wrinkle nearest your wrist.
If your focus was a spotlight, draw how wide or narrow the beam is now.
Draw the exact curve of the nearest spoon, fork, or utensil.
Look at the nearest door. Draw how far open or closed it is.
Draw the pattern of light and shadow falling across your desk right now.
If your curiosity was a flame, draw which way it is leaning.
Look at your phone screen. Draw the smudges or fingerprints on it.
